headline: Can T-Mobile Sustain Its Strong Customer Growth Momentum?
summary: TMUS is expanding its wireless and broadband customer base, raising its 2026 guidance as ARPA rises and gains in 5G and broadband continue amid intense telecom competition.

headline: Cisco AI Security Push And Quantum Plans Test Investor Expectations
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has launched Cloud Control, an AI focused platform that unifies management and security across its networking and security products. The company also introduced Live Protect, a real time runtime security offering aimed at protecting applications and workloads as they operate. Cisco expanded its quantum safe security initiatives, outlining a roadmap to bring quantum resistant protections across its core portfolio. New collaborations with NetApp focus on secure AI...

headline: Tutor Perini Backlog Bolstered with Award of $651.8 Million Project to Modernize and Protect Critical Power Infrastructure on Naval Base Guam
summary: LOS ANGELES, June 11, 2026--Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) (the "Company"), a leading civil, building and specialty construction company, announced today that it has been awarded a task order valued at approximately $651.8 million by the Naval Facilities Engineering Systems Command (NAVFAC) Pacific for Project P‑1181, Harden Critical Feeders on Naval Base Guam. headline: Omdia Appoints Theresa Lanowitz as Principal Analyst for Vulnerability and Risk Management
summary: LONDON, June 11, 2026--Omdia has appointed Theresa Lanowitz as Principal Analyst covering vulnerability and risk management within its Cybersecurity go-to-market research practice, bringing decades of experience in software development, industry analysis, and cybersecurity leadership to the role.
